author: codex-agent

patch.value: Net-new capability for governance workflows that need comment visibility across many items in one deterministic command.
Add a status/type-filtered comments audit command that returns latest-N comment snapshots across items without per-item serial calls.
CLI provides a bulk comments audit surface with status/type/assignee filters and latest-N output in deterministic grouped shape with docs and tests.
One-call comments auditing for large trackers
Removes high shell/process overhead in maintenance workflows
Bulk comments snapshots are queryable by filters
Current workflow requires hundreds of per-item comments calls

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search bulk comments audit status latest --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; no active item currently tracks a bulk comments query command surface.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Keep pm comments single-item semantics unchanged and add an additive audit command.

message: Create feature for bulk comments audit query | explicit_unset=dependencies,learnings,files,tests,docs
